schema.description: A movie recommendation service that interfaces with the TMDb API to search, retrieve details, and discover popular movies.

tools.name: get_movies
tools.description: Search for movie suggestions from TMDb based on a keyword matching movie titles or descriptions.

keyword.description: Search keyword to match against movie titles or descriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of movie results to return.

movies.description: List of movies matching the search keyword.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_movie_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific movie including cast, genres, and ratings.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.
The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

duration.description: The runtime of the movie in minutes.

genres.description: List of genre categories the movie belongs to.

vote_average.description: The average user rating score for the movie on TMDb.

views.description: The total number of views or popularity count for the movie.

actors.description: List of main actors appearing in the movie.

tools.name: get_popular_movies
tools.description: Retrieve a list of currently popular movies from TMDb, with optional filtering by rating, views, or release date.

filter.description: Sorting criteria for popularity ranking. Accepts 'vote_average' for rating-based or 'views' for view count-based sorting.

date.description: Filter movies released on or after this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

limit.description: Maximum number of movie results to return. Defaults to 5 if not specified.

movies.description: List of popular movies matching the specified filter criteria.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vote_average.description: The average user rating score for the movie on TMDb.

views.description: The total number of views or popularity count for the movie.

actors.description: List of main actors appearing in the movie.

scenarios.description: Minimal movie database with one popular movie - tests basic functionality

550.title: Fight Club
550.overview: A ticking-time-bomb insomniac and a slippery soap salesman channel primal male aggression into a shocking new form of therapy.

scenarios.description: Moderate database with 4 movies of different genres and ratings - tests typical use cases and filtering

278.title: The Shawshank Redemption
278.overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

238.title: The Godfather
238.overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

19995.title: Avatar
19995.overview: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

scenarios.description: Rich database with 7 diverse movies including edge cases (minimal data, maximum ratings, various genres) - tests complex filtering and recommendations

680.title: Pulp Fiction
680.overview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper.

13.title: Forrest Gump
13.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events.

424.title: Schindler's List
424.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives during the Holocaust.

122.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
122.overview: Aragorn is revealed as the heir to the ancient kings as he, Gandalf and the other members of the broken fellowship struggle to save Gondor.

27205.title: Inception
27205.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

497.title: The Green Mile
497.overview: A supernatural tale set on death row in a Southern prison.

scenarios.description: Empty database with no movies - tests handling of empty collections and edge cases

test_cases.description: Valid case: Search with keyword 'Fight' and limit 5
Valid case: Search with keyword 'therapy' and limit 1
Boundary case: Search with non-existent keyword
Error case: Empty keyword string
test_cases.error: Keyword must be a non-empty string

test_cases.description: Valid case: Get details for existing movie ID 550
Error case: Non-existent movie ID
Valid case: Get popular movies with default parameters
Valid case: Filter by vote_average with limit 3
test_cases.output: Successfully retrieved movies sorted by rating

test_cases.description: Valid case: Filter by views with date filter
test_cases.output: Successfully retrieved movies filtered by date and sorted by views

test_cases.description: Error case: Invalid filter value

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly. All state preserved correctly.

test_cases.error: Keyword must be a non-empty string

test_cases.output: Retrieved complete movie details with all fields
Retrieved complete movie details with all fields
Retrieved 3 popular movies in default order (by popular_movies list)
Retrieved 2 movies released after 2000 (Avatar 2009, Dark Knight 2008)

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly. All movie data, popular_movies list, and api_key preserved correctly.

test_cases.description: Search for movies with keyword 'Fiction'
Search for movies with keyword 'dream'
Search for movies with keyword 'Tom Hanks'
test_cases.output: Found 0 movies (keyword searches titles/overviews, not actors)

test_cases.description: Get details for Pulp Fiction (movie_id: 680)
test_cases.output: Successfully retrieved all movie details including title, overview, release_date, duration, genres, vote_average, views, and actors

test_cases.description: Get details for Inception (movie_id: 27205)
Get details for Indie Film with empty fields (movie_id: 12345)
test_cases.output: Successfully handled movie with empty/zero values for overview, duration, genres, vote_average, views, and actors

test_cases.description: Get popular movies with default settings
test_cases.output: Returned 5 popular movies in order: Inception, Forrest Gump, LOTR, Pulp Fiction, The Green Mile

test_cases.description: Get top 3 popular movies filtered by vote_average
test_cases.output: Returned 3 movies sorted by rating: Forrest Gump (8.5), LOTR (8.5), Pulp Fiction (8.5)

test_cases.description: Get top 3 popular movies filtered by views
test_cases.output: Returned 3 movies sorted by views: Inception (55000), Forrest Gump (48000), LOTR (44000)

test_cases.description: Get popular movies released after 2000-01-01
test_cases.output: Returned 2 movies released after 2000: Inception (2010-07-16) and LOTR (2003-12-17)

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly. All 7 movies preserved with correct data, popular_movies list intact, api_key preserved.

test_cases.description: Valid case with keyword 'a' and limit 1
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty movies)

test_cases.description: Valid case with keyword 'action' and limit 5
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty movies)

test_cases.description: Valid case with keyword 'comedy' and default limit
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty movies)

test_cases.description: Error case with empty keyword
test_cases.result: Correctly rejected with validation error
test_cases.error: Keyword must be a non-empty string

test_cases.description: Valid movie_id but not found in empty movies dict
test_cases.result: Correctly rejected - movie not found

test_cases.description: Error case with negative movie_id
test_cases.result: Correctly rejected with validation error
test_cases.error: Movie ID must be a non-negative integer

test_cases.description: Valid case with no filters
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty popular_movies)

test_cases.description: Valid case with vote_average filter
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty popular_movies)

test_cases.description: Valid case with all parameters
test_cases.result: Success - returned empty list (expected for empty popular_movies)

test_cases.description: Error case with invalid filter
test_cases.result: Correctly rejected with validation error

test_cases.description: Error case with invalid date format
test_cases.result: Correctly rejected with validation error
test_cases.error: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format

save_scenario.comparison: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly - no modifications expected for boundary case with empty data structures
